Year: The year during which the customer service data was recorded
Quarter: The quarter of the year (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) during which the customer service data was recorded
Average_Email_Response_Time: The average time in hours it took for the customer service team to respond to email inquiries
Average_Chat_Phone_Response_Time: The average time in minutes it took for the customer service team to respond to chat and phone inquiries during business hours
After_Hours_Response_System: The system used to respond to inquiries outside of business hours
Next_Year_Response_Time_Target: The target reduction in response times for the following year

After_Hours_Response_System: Automated system with a next-business-day response
